element_introduction_order.first_appears: Stage select / first Robot Master stage
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Immediately tested in stage selection; players must choose stage order strategically

element_introduction_order.first_appears: After defeating each Robot Master boss
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each weapon becomes essential for defeating subsequent bosses; weak-to-strong chain established

element_introduction_order.first_appears: After completing certain stages (new to series)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Strategic health management; can be used at any time during stage traversal
Required to access previously inaccessible areas; enables stage progression gating
Linear progression; rematch with all 8 bosses via teleport devices in single room; final Dr. Wily encounter
Story twist; reveals technological deception mechanic unique to final battle

typical_relief_triggers: Obtaining new weapon with clear weakness chain advantage
Finding Energy Tank to restore health
Completing stage and receiving password (save point equivalent)
typical_tension_triggers: Encountering Robot Master stage theme (thematic threat)
Discovering stage has required special platform item (gating)
Facing rematch bosses in rapid succession
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Player-controlled stage order pacing in first 8 levels creates agency; tension rises through weapon weakness dependency; Wily fortress forces linear gauntlet pacing with cumulative fatigue

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Special platform items placed in stages create vertical space gating; areas unreachable without specific item type signal optional/future-access content

difficulty_curve.early_game: Flexible; player chooses stage order. Optimal weak-to-strong chain progression available to skilled players reduces difficulty; suboptimal order creates natural difficulty walls forcing learning of weapon dependencies
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increasing complexity as players acquire weapon arsenal; some Robot Masters gain vulnerabilities only accessible with specific weapons; stage design becomes more vertically complex requiring platform items
difficulty_curve.late_game: Dr. Wily's fortress escalates through linear 5-stage structure; forced rematch with all 8 bosses creates sustained tension; final battle introduces holographic projection mechanic and deception narrative
notable_spikes: Quick Man stage (noted for extreme difficulty; spike in enemy placement)
Dr. Wily fortress entry (transition from open-ended stage selection to linear gauntlet)
Boss rematches in Wily fortress (cumulative fatigue from multiple consecutive boss fights)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each Robot Master stage visually and mechanically reflects their weapon (e.g., Air Man in sky stage with wind/tornado mechanics; Wood Man in forest with leaf shield visual theme). This creates intuitive learning of boss relationships before actual combat.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Air Man stage (sky-themed, tornado enemies); Wood Man stage (forest-themed, leaf shield mechanics)

notable_level_patterns.description: Access to certain stage areas locked behind needing specific Robot Master weapon acquired elsewhere. Establishes non-linear play order with soft gating. Teaches players weapon weakness chains through environmental necessity rather than explicit tutorial.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Multi-stage; examples include areas requiring specific platform items

notable_level_patterns.description: Special platform items (obtained from bosses) create temporary platforms allowing Mega Man to reach high-altitude or isolated areas. Tests precision platforming and spatial reasoning after weapon acquisition.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Crash Man stage (Mega Man shown using floating platform to reach ladder)

notable_level_patterns.description: Dr. Wily fortress compresses all 8 Robot Masters into single teleport room. Players choose rematch order but must defeat all sequentially. Creates cumulative difficulty and resource depletion challenge distinct from initial encounters.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Dr. Wily fortress (stage structure designed as single room with 8 teleport portals)

notable_level_patterns.description: Final Dr. Wily battle presents fake alien threat revealed as holographic projection. Introduces story-mechanical integration where visual deception maps to game mechanic (projection device malfunction). Unique ending sequence with player choice (spare vs. defeat Wily).
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Final boss chamber beneath Wily fortress
